title: Implement VIP order discounts
instructions: Implement VIP discounts across the order service. VIP customers get a 10% discount only when subtotal is at least 100. Standard customers get no discount. summarize_order must use discount_rate and return rounded subtotal, discount, and total values. Keep the fix small and do not change tests.
constraints: Prefer changes limited to discounts.py and orders.py.
acceptance: summarize_order applies the VIP discount amount to total.
